name: Orbital Period Calculator
description: Calculate the orbital period for a circular orbit around a body.
formulaDescription: Orbital period is the time to complete one full orbit at a given radius.

example.explanation: A low Earth orbit at ~200 km altitude has a period of about 92.5 minutes (5,552 seconds).

faqs.question: How does altitude affect orbital period?
faqs.answer: Higher orbit radii increase orbital period because the satellite travels a longer path at a slower velocity.
